Mtn For Order That Matters In Req For Admissions Be Deem Admitted
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Monday, October 21, 2013:
DIANE WARRREN, defendant appearing in Propria Persona; No other appearances.

The Court did not receive an objection to its tentative ruling by 4PM on October 18, 2013. The Court, therefore, adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff CACH, LLC'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deem Admitted is granted as unopposed. The matters in the request for admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions in the sum of $602.50 are awarded. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
